content:
🚀 RuView | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling non-visual, real-time human sensing and monitoring in environments using existing WiFi infrastructure.
✨ Key Features: • WiFi DensePose for human pose estimation • Vital sign monitoring (breathing rate, heart rate) • Presence detection • Edge AI system running on low-power hardware (ESP32)
📖 Summary: RuView is an edge AI perception system that uses commodity WiFi signals to perform real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection without cameras or wearables. It analyzes Channel State Information (CSI) disturbances to reconstruct body position and physiological data, operating entirely on low-power hardware like ESP32.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
